title: SIGSEGV migrating after using with BOINC
body:
### Issue Description

Running podman after using via boinc service causes the SIGSEGV 

BOINC/boinc/issues/6916

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run podman via boinc wrapper
2. Stop boinc service 
3. try to run podman run hello-world


### Describe the results you received

sudo -u boinc podman run hello-world
ERRO[0000] invalid internal status, try resetting the pause process with "podman system migrate": could not find any running process: no such process

If I do as instructed I get exception:

sudo -u boinc podman system migrate
stopped ab93e7d7350c285d9bfa988684d4d7ae8da63e2b1552a9bec36dbf11db35f4f6
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x0 pc=0x1590d5b]

goroutine 1 [running]:
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*storageService).UnmountContainerImage(0x0, {0xc000755580?, 0x1b?}, 0x0)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/storage.go:235 +0x3b
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).unmount(0xc0007aa500, 0x40?)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_internal.go:2488 +0x3a
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).cleanupStorage(0xc0007aa500)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_internal.go:2019 +0x4c5
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).cleanup(0xc0007aa500, {0x20c2bc0, 0x2f41240})
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_internal.go:2114 +0x5fb
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).waitForConmonToExitAndSave(0xc0007aa500)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_internal.go:1517 +0x4c5
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).stop(0xc0007aa500, 0xa)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_internal.go:1459 +0x5c5

github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_api.go:320 +0xce
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Container).Stop(...)
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/container_api.go:290
github.com/containers/podman/libpod.(*Runtime).Migrate(0xc0004dce00, {0x0, 0x0})
github.com/containers/podman/libpod/runtime_migrate_linux.go:76 +0x2e5
github.com/containers/podman/pkg/domain/infra/abi.(*ContainerEngine).Migrate(0x0?, {0x0?, 0xf4ec330eaeccd0f5?}, {{0x0?, 0x0?}})
github.com/containers/podman/pkg/domain/infra/abi/system.go:307 +0x25
github.com/containers/podman/cmd/podman/system.migrate(0x2e3bfa0?, {0x2f41240?, 0x0?, 0x0?})
github.com/containers/podman/cmd/podman/system/migrate.go:56 +0x45
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).execute(0x2e3bfa0, {0xc00003ea40, 0x0, 0x0})
github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:989 +0xabb
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteC(0x2e24cc0)
github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1117 +0x44f
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).Execute(...)
github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1041
github.com/spf13/cobra.(*Command).ExecuteContext(...)
github.com/spf13/cobra/command.go:1034
main.Execute()
github.com/containers/podman/cmd/podman/root.go:119 +0x57
main.main()
github.com/containers/podman/cmd/podman/main.go:62 +0x4b2

### Describe the results you expected

No SIGSEGV

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: We only support the latest version upstream so please test that, this sounds like what I already fixed in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27604 which was fixed in v5.7.1
